---
title: "From Spreadsheets to Scripts: Modernizing IR/IE Workflows with R"
author: Logan King
institute: "Haywood Community College"
format: 
    revealjs:
        footer: "NCAIR 2026"
        logo: assets/HCC_Hex.png
        transition: slide
        theme: brand
---
```{r}
#| label: setup
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)

# Read in data examples
```

## Session Overview 
::: {style="font-size: 0.85em;"}
In this session, we will cover the popular use of Spreadsheet software *(like Excel)* in IR/IE workflows and the benefits and potential tradeoffs of transitioning to R.
:::
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="60%" style="font-size: 0.65em;"}
Session Objectives

- Evaluate the benefits and tradeoffs of using Excel vs. R for IR/IE workflows.
- Identify projects and workflows that would benefit from transitioning to R.
- Formulate first steps for transitioning to R for IR/IE work.

:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
![*Source: Jumping Rivers*](assets/featured.png){width=100% style="font-size: 0.5em;"}
:::
::::

## Is this you?
![*Source: Google Gemini*](assets/Gemini_Generated_Image_mnzcyumnzcyumnzc.png){width=100% style="font-size: 0.3em;"}

## The Reality of IR/IE Workflows in Excel 
::: {style="font-size: 0.75em;"}
The reality is that many IR/IE professionals rely heavily on spreadsheet software like Excel for data management, analysis, and reporting. While Excel is a powerful tool, it has limitations that can hinder efficiency and accuracy in IR/IE workflows.
:::

::: {style="font-size: 0.65em;"}
- **Scalability**: Excel can struggle with large datasets, leading to slow performance and potential crashes.
- **Reproducibility**: Manual processes in Excel can lead to errors and make it difficult to reproduce analyses.
- **Version Control and Collaboration**: Sharing Excel files can lead to version control issues and difficulties in tracking changes.
:::

## From Spreadsheets to Scripts

## Live Examples: Excel &rarr; R

## Benefits *and* Tradeoffs

## First Steps for Your Own Transition

## Resources, Tools, and Community
- [R Project for Statistical Computing](https://www.r-project.org/)
- [Rstudio, Positron, Quarto & Posit](https://posit.co/)
- [ThIRsdays IR and IE Community of Practice](https://www.reddit.com/r/ThIRsdays/)
- [R for Data Science](https://r4ds.had.co.nz/)

## Q&A {.center}
[{{< bi patch-question size=8em >}}]{style="color: #1E541E; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 70vh;"}

## Thank You! {.center}

Connect with me!

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
[{{< bi linkedin size=1.5em >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/logan-king-91607b1ab)
&nbsp; Logan King
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
[{{< bi envelope-fill size=1.5em >}}](mailto:rking3387@haywood.edu)
&nbsp; rking3387@haywood.edu
:::

::::
